ui.topbar_tag: Global Bulk Wholesale · OEM/ODM Specialist · Since 1998
ui.hero_eyebrow: ✦ Leading China Water Filter Manufacturer | NSF & ISO Certified Factory
ui.hero_desc: Global bulk wholesale supplier of high-performance PP Melt Blown, CTO, GAC filters, and RO membranes. Since 1998, we provide NSF/ISO certified OEM/ODM technical support for 50+ countries.
ui.about_title: Suvni filtrlash sohasida 20 yildan ortiq mukammallik
ui.about_desc: Eco Express Water — suvni tozalash uchun filtr materiallari va filtr uskunalariga ixtisoslashgan yuqori texnologiyali atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish korxonasi. 1998 yilda tashkil etilgan bo'lib, mahsulotlarimiz tadqiqot va ishlanmalar, ishlab chiqarish, marketing va texnik qo'llab-quvvatlashgacha bo'lgan to'liq jarayonni birlashtiradi. Kompaniyamiz Zhejiang provinsiyasi, Haining shahri, Yuanhua shaharchasida joylashgan. Bizda birinchi darajali texnik ekspertlar jamoasi, integratsiyalashgan funksional o'rta sinov/kengaytirish sinovi va keng ko'lamli ishlab chiqarish markazi mavjud. Biz Malayziya, Indoneziya va boshqa musulmon mamlakatlaridagi musulmon iste'molchilarining o'ziga xos ehtiyojlari va talablarini qondiradigan halol suv filtrlarining sertifikatlangan yetkazib beruvchisimiz.
ui.about_feat_1: 1998 yilda tashkil etilgan – Yigirma yildan ortiq ishlab chiqarish tajribasi
ui.about_feat_2: To'liq vertikal "integratsiya": R&D, ishlab chiqarish, QC, logistika
ui.about_feat_3: NSF, ISO, CE, and Halal certified manufacturing center
ui.about_feat_4: Professional OEM/ODM technical support for global brands
ui.about_feat_5: Xitoyning suv filtrlash markazi — Zhejiangning Haining shahrida joylashgan
ui.why_desc: Xom ashyodan tortib yakuniy tekshiruvgacha har bir mahsulot bizning qat'iy sifat nazorati tizimidan o'tadi.
ui.why_card1_desc: Biz ishlab chiqarayotgan har bir partiya NSF / ISO / CE / Halol sertifikatlari bilan tasdiqlangan.
ui.why_card2_desc: Bozoringizga mos keladigan shaxsiy brending, qadoqlash va mahsulot xususiyatlari.
ui.why_card3_desc: PP, ko'mir, tez ulanadigan va sizib chiqishni sinash uchun 4 ta maxsus ishlab chiqarish liniyasi.
ui.why_card4_desc: 50 dan ortiq mamlakatlarga yo'lga qo'yilgan eksport logistikasi bilan yetkazib berish muddati 7–15 kun.
ui.products_desc: 8 ta toifa bo'yicha 42 ta model – ixcham kartrijlardan tortib vertikal dispenserlar va to'liq RO tizimlarigacha.
ui.workshop_desc: 4 ta ixtisoslashgan ishlab chiqarish liniyasi: PP filtri, ko'mir bloki, tez ulanadigan filtr va avtomatik sizib chiqishni aniqlash.
ui.exhibition_desc: Bizning jamoamiz bilan AquaTech Shanghai va boshqa yirik sanoat tadbirlarida uchrashing.
ui.contact_desc: Loyihangiz haqida bizga aytib bering. Bizning savdo muhandislarimiz 24 soat ichida javob berishadi.
ui.contact_address: 1# Chuangxin Road, Yuanhua Town, Haining, Zhejiang Province, China
ui.form_sub: Sizning xususiyatlaringiz bo'yicha batafsil kotirovka oling.
ui.footer_brand_desc: Leading China manufacturer of water filtration solutions since 1998. Specialized in PP Melt Blown, CTO Carbon Block, GAC, and RO membranes for global bulk wholesale and OEM/ODM partners.

products.name: Alkaline Water Purifier System
products.desc: Produces alkaline water by increasing pH levels and adding essential minerals. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Antibacterial Mineralization Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Effectively removes harmful bacteria and viruses and adds beneficial minerals. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: 30-inch Three Stage Big Blue Water Filter
products.desc: Three-stage filtration: PP filter (large particles), RO membrane (heavy metals, bacteria, viruses), CTO Carbon Block (chlorine, taste). Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: CTO Coconut Shell CTO Carbon Block Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Coconut shell activated carbon with high iodine value (1000) for effective purification. 10 inches length, 2.5 inch outer diameter. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Compressed Activated CTO Carbon Block

products.name: Industrial High-Flow CTO Carbon Block Filter
